/CAL:ATC TO ADDRESS HOUSING/DEF:IS PRESENT VIA ZOOM/EMMOD:THE HOME DETENTION REQUIREMENT IS REMOVED/LDPX:07-01-22 (60TH)/X:PRELIMINARY HEARING DATE OF 06-27-22 IS CONFIRMED,/DOP/

/CAL:DEFENSE BAIL MOTION/ACM/X:AS A CONDITION OF RELEASE, THE DEFENDANT SHALL BE PLACED ON PRE-TRIAL MONITORING BY THE SHERIFF'S OFFICE,/DEF:SHALLBE FITTED WITH A GPS DEVICE ON HOME DETENTION AND IS ORDERED TO COMPLY WITHALL TERMS OF RELEASE AS SET FORTH ON THE RECORD AND BY THE SFSO/X:THE COURT ALSO IMPOSES THE FOLLOWING RELEASE CONDITIONS:/X:DEFENDANT SHALL PARTICIPATE IN OUTPATIENT SUBSTANCE ABUSE TREATMENT WHICH MAY BE DONE VIA ZOOM,//X:DEFENDANT SHALL NOT CONSUME ALCOHOL OR MARIJUANA,/RX/WEAP/WS/CTORD: DEFENDANT SHALL BE RELEASED AFTER A COORDINATED PICK-UP WITH SFSO COMMUNITY PROGRAMS IS IN PLACE,/X:SEE SIGNED ORDER IN FILE,/X:PRELIMINARY HEARING IN DEPT, 9 ON 05-13-22 IS CONFIRMED,/DOP/

/CAL:BAIL MOTION/X:PD IS APPEARING VIA ZOOM/X:COURT GRANTS THE BAIL MOTION TO MODIFY/BAIL:75,000/X:LAST DAY IS CORRECTED ON THE RECORD TO REFLECT AS LD 05-16-22 (10TH)/X:DATE OF 05-13-22 IS CONFIRMED/X:PD'S ORAL REQUEST TO ADD THIS CASE TO JOIN #22001141 IN DEPT, 20 ON 05-09-22 IS GRANTED/CONTD:05-09-22 IN DEPT, 20 TO JOIN #22001141/DOP/
/TEXT:DEFT ENT NG PLEA(S) & DEN OF ALLEG/PD/FAWC/DEFTARR1/X:THE DEFENSE RESERVES THE RIGHT TO DEMURRER,/NTW/LDPX:05-122/BAIL:150000/CONTD:PRELIMINARY HEARING/DOP/
